narrative:
Saltcreek-South (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,004 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
